I'm not aware of any information that suggests he has worked as a disc jockey either. However, I do know that Eugene Hütz has also worked as a radio host and DJ, particularly in the early days of his career. Therefore, it seems that Eugene Hütz has disc jockeying in his accomplishment credits, but I couldn't find any information that suggests the same for Tracey Thorn. </think>
<answer> Eugene Hütz </answer>
